title: helianthemum ledifolium subsp. campylopus
intro: Helianthemum ledifolium subsp. campylopus, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and reduce stress and anxiety. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Helianthemum ledifolium subsp. campylopus include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
